lead_creator.description: Top-tier statistical impact (top 25%) reflecting primary offensive initiation. Statistical impact captures creation, efficiency, and impact contributions.

guard_wing.description: Perimeter function: creation, defense, spacing, or connective play. Above-median SI qualifies; strong postseason presence with any SI also qualifies.

wing_forward.description: Versatile forward function: scoring, two-way play, or connective value. Two paths: high-impact forward regardless of scoring, or scoring forward with some SI.

forward_big.description: Frontcourt scoring or team-enabling high-impact big. High TP qualifies directly; strong team success + solid SI also qualifies.

anchor.description: Interior defensive, rebounding, or size role. Three general OR-paths: (1) traditional postseason + team anchor, (2) non-scoring moderate-impact player (SI 15–52, TP ≤ 35) capturing interior defensive/rebounding profiles without scoring requirements, (3) relaxed postseason-team combo for Finals-level contributors. No path requires named-player assignment or position metadata.
